description: Memo 快速引用功能 - 在卡片悬浮时提供一键引用入口，复用现有 relations 系统快速创建关联笔记

userStories.title: MemoEditorForm 暴露 addRelation 和 focusTextarea 方法
userStories.description: As a developer, I need MemoEditorForm to expose addRelation and focusTextarea methods via useImperativeHandle so that the parent component can programmatically add a relation and focus the input.
acceptanceCriteria: MemoEditorForm 使用 forwardRef 包装，暴露 ref 接口
useImperativeHandle 暴露 addRelation(memo: MemoListItemDto) 方法：将 memo 添加到 selectedRelations，若已存在则跳过
useImperativeHandle 暴露 focusTextarea() 方法：聚焦 textarea 并将光标移至末尾
不改变组件现有 props 接口和内部提交逻辑
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: memo-card.tsx 新增引用按钮
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a quote button when hovering over a memo card so that I can quickly create a related note.
acceptanceCriteria: 在卡片操作按钮区域（group-hover 显示区）新增引用按钮，使用 lucide-react 的 Quote 图标
按钮样式与现有编辑/删除按钮一致，仅悬浮时可见
按钮有 title 属性提示文字「引用此笔记」
MemoCard 组件接受新 prop：onQuote?: (memo: MemoDto) => void
点击按钮调用 onQuote(memo)，并阻止事件冒泡（e.stopPropagation()）
若 onQuote 未传入，按钮不渲染
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Home 页面串联引用逻辑：添加关联并聚焦输入框
userStories.description: As a user, I want clicking the quote button to automatically add the memo as a relation in the editor and scroll/focus the input so I can start writing immediately.
acceptanceCriteria: Home 页面持有 MemoEditorForm 的 ref（类型为 MemoEditorFormRef）
实现 handleQuoteMemo(memo: MemoDto) 函数：调用 ref.current.addRelation(memo) 添加关联
handleQuoteMemo 调用后执行 scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' }) 滚动至编辑区
滚动后调用 ref.current.focusTextarea() 聚焦输入框
将 handleQuoteMemo 作为 onQuote prop 传递给每个 MemoCard
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
